# Roger Vilà - Senior Backend Engineer

Senior Backend Engineer with over 12 years of professional experience designing, building, and operating cloud-native backend systems and distributed architectures.

## Profile Details
- **Role:** Senior Backend Engineer
- **Birthday:** April 17, 1992
- **Location:** Sitges, Barcelona
- **Website:** https://rogervila.es
- **GitHub:** https://github.com/rogervila
- **LinkedIn:** https://es.linkedin.com/in/rogervilacamon
- **Stack Overflow:** https://stackoverflow.com/users/3333549/rogervila

---

## About Me
As a Senior Backend Engineer with over 12 years of professional experience, I design and deliver cloud-native backend systems and distributed architectures that power scalable, mission-critical applications. I have worked extensively with AWS and Cloudflare to build and operate secure, high-availability services, and I bring hands-on experience with Kubernetes for container orchestration and Docker for containerised workloads across both professional and personal environments.

My core expertise spans the design of secure RESTful APIs and event-driven architectures — using messaging systems such as Apache Pulsar, AWS SQS, and Redis Pub/Sub — as well as data modelling across relational databases (MySQL, PostgreSQL) and NoSQL stores (MongoDB, Redis). I have consistently delivered reliability improvements: maintaining a 99% SLA at Convelio, reducing tech debt and incidents by 20% at InfoPro Digital Automotive, and managing incidents with structured postmortem practices.

I am experienced with observability and monitoring tooling, including Grafana, Datadog, and the ELK Stack, and I apply SRE principles — incident prioritisation, man-day budgets for tech maintenance, and postmortem-driven improvements — to keep production systems stable and continuously improving. I have also worked with Java and contributed to CI/CD pipelines using Jenkins.

Throughout my career I have acted as a technical leader and mentor, guiding distributed remote teams across Europe and Asia, conducting design and code reviews, and raising engineering standards through automation, testing, and shared best practices.

Beyond my professional work, I actively contribute to open-source software. I maintain Equipment, a Python scaffolding framework used in production environments, and a collection of AI agent skills that I use to automate engineering workflows in my personal projects.

---

## Skills

- **Backend Engineering (90%):** REST APIs, Java, PHP (Laravel/Symfony), event-driven systems
- **Python (90%):** Flask, FastAPI, Equipment framework, data processing
- **PHP (90%):** Laravel, Symfony, Slim
- **Cloud & Infrastructure (85%):** AWS, Cloudflare, Docker, and Kubernetes. Arsys as IaaS provider
- **Databases & Messaging (85%):** MySQL, PostgreSQL, MongoDB, Redis, Apache Pulsar, AWS SQS
- **DevOps & Observability (80%):** Grafana, Datadog, ELK Stack, Jenkins CI/CD, SonarQube
- **JavaScript / TypeScript (80%):** React, Vue, Alpine.js, Hono.dev and Node.js

---

## Professional Experience

### Senior Software Developer at InfoPro Digital Automotive
- **Location:** Barcelona
- **Dates:** September 16, 2024 - Present
- **Details & Accomplishments:**
  - Modernise legacy Java and PHP SaaS APIs deployed on AWS and Cloudflare, integrating data sources from multiple providers.
  - Reduce tech debt and production incidents by 20% through systematic refactoring, tightened test coverage, and improved deployment practices.
  - Manage incident response triaging by severity, estimating resolution timelines, and delivering structured postmortems to drive long-term reliability improvements.
  - Mentor junior developers, conducting code reviews and sharing backend engineering best practices across the team.

### Tech Lead at Wivapp.com
- **Location:** Barcelona
- **Dates:** February 19, 2024 - September 16, 2024
- **Details & Accomplishments:**
  - Develop and maintain a scalable MVP solution for restaurants.
  - Lead the development of a new product from scratch.

### Senior Backend Developer at Convelio
- **Location:** Paris, France
- **Dates:** May 1, 2022 - February 19, 2024
- **Details & Accomplishments:**
  - Design and maintain scalable, secure PHP-based APIs supporting a high-volume enterprise logistics platform, ensuring a 99% SLA.
  - Collaborate with frontend engineers and cross-functional teams to design and evolve the platform's API contract.
  - Optimise API performance, latency, and reliability; implement observability practices using Grafana, Datadog, and the ELK Stack.
  - Continuously improve code quality and maintainability through rigorous testing, peer code reviews, and adherence to engineering best practices.
  - Refactor and harden legacy code for security and performance; eliminated over 10,000 lines of dead and unsafe code.

### Senior Programming Analyst at K-LAGAN
- **Location:** Barcelona
- **Dates:** August 17, 2017 - May 1, 2022
- **Details & Accomplishments:**
  - Architect and operate a distributed microservices platform with 10+ Docker-based services, orchestrated with Kubernetes in production environments.
  - Design and implement event-driven integrations using Apache Pulsar, AWS SQS, and Redis Pub/Sub, decoupling services for improved scalability and fault tolerance.
  - Use Laravel for secure API integrations and background task processing; Python for data processing pipelines and RPA automation.
  - Build and maintain Jenkins CI/CD pipelines, achieving 80% code coverage on SonarQube across the platform.
  - Act as tech lead for remote engineering teams across Europe and Asia conducting architecture reviews, code reviews, and technical mentorship.

### Full Stack Developer at HEALTH DATALINE EUROPE SA
- **Location:** Barcelona
- **Dates:** March 1, 2017 - August 17, 2017
- **Details & Accomplishments:**
  - Adapt eCommerce websites creating new front-end versions for specific devices with Onsen UI. More than 10 client websites migrated.
  - Create internal APIs to retrieve data from different data sources on the backend.
  - Maintain and apply SEO to toopharm.com and healthdataline.com websites, increasing by 1% of new visits every month.

### CEO & Co-Founder at SeeDoCare S.L.
- **Location:** Barcelona
- **Dates:** October 8, 2015 - March 1, 2017
- **Details & Accomplishments:**
  - Develop web applications tailored to our client's needs. 3 clients in the first year.
  - Implement custom eCommerce, SaaS, and CMS solutions. 20% cost reduction compared to other B2B platforms.
  - Integrate additional services like SEO, Brand design, and Marketing solutions.
  - In 2017, the lack of big clients plus the job offer we found on the market made us take the decision to close the business and work full-time for other companies.

### Software Developer at Emotion Experience
- **Location:** Barcelona
- **Dates:** November 1, 2016 - February 1, 2017
- **Details & Accomplishments:**
  - Develop an interactive space where the public can interact with the GFT brand directly.
  - Create a specific software for each action, working with LED displays and interactive panels.
  - Develop software for a specific setup for GFT called "GFT Lab".

### Web Developer at caravelo
- **Location:** Barcelona
- **Dates:** November 1, 2015 - November 1, 2016
- **Details & Accomplishments:**
  - Develop a product for Volaris Airline company called "Volado Volaris", which offered cheap trips with few hours in advance for planes with empty seats. First released after 1 month.
  - Maintain product websites for Airline companies.
  - Implement a design system to easily integrate new Airline companies into our products. 2 new airlines used it.

### Web Developer at SIQUR S.P.A.
- **Location:** Italy
- **Dates:** April 17, 2015 - November 1, 2015
- **Details & Accomplishments:**
  - Develop the Spanish version of the eCommerce website. 1-10 monthly products sold in the first year.
  - Develop a WordPress blog as part of the marketing strategy. 1-2 posts every month by external collaborators.
  - Managed video editing, blog writing, SEO, analytics, and marketing campaigns.

### Web Developer Instructor at Centro Informática Profesional CIPSA
- **Location:** Italy (Barcelona/Remote)
- **Dates:** October 8, 2014 - April 17, 2015
- **Details & Accomplishments:**
  - Hired as an instructor after finishing the Full Stack Web Design and Programming Master. More than 50 students in 1 year.
  - Guide my students to grow up as developers, starting with a very simple HTML landing page and finishing the course with a big full-stack project.
  - More than 50% of students found a job after finishing the course.

### Web Developer at Mediterrani Food
- **Location:** Barcelona
- **Dates:** May 1, 2013 - June 21, 2014
- **Details & Accomplishments:**
  - Develop and maintain 1 WordPress site.
  - Blog writing, video editing, Community management, and SEO. More than 10 new clients thanks to that content.
  - Apply the brand design to the website, reports, and communications.

## Education

## Portfolio & Projects

### Equipment
- **Category:** Python
- **Description:** Production-ready Python scaffolding framework for scalable backend projects.
- **Project URL:** https://equipment-python.vercel.app
- **Image URL:** https://equipment-python.vercel.app/img/logo.svg

### Array Diff Multidimensional
- **Category:** PHP
- **Description:** Compare the difference between two multidimensional arrays.
- **Project URL:** https://github.com/rogervila/array-diff-multidimensional
- **Image URL:** https://banners.beyondco.de/Array%20Diff%20Multidimensional.png?theme=light&packageManager=composer+require&packageName=rogervila%2Farray-diff-multidimensional&pattern=architect&style=style_1&description=Works+like+the+PHP+array_diff%28%29+function%2C+but+with+multidimensional+arrays.&md=1&showWatermark=1&fontSize=100px&images=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.php.net%2Fimages%2Flogos%2Fnew-php-logo.svg
- **Badges:**
  - Composer downloads: https://poser.pugx.org/rogervila/array-diff-multidimensional/downloads
  - GitHub stars: https://img.shields.io/github/stars/rogervila/array-diff-multidimensional.svg?style=social

### Laravel Email Failer

He has been a great team member from day one with very strong problem solving skills. Another area I’d like to highlight is his strong background in dev-ops, which has been fundamental to our team. Roger is an asset to any company."

Moreover, Roger consistently demonstrates strong communication skills and a collaborative approach, ensuring seamless integration with cross-functional teams. Beyond his technical abilities, Roger is genuinely a nice person, and it has been a pleasure working with him!"
